title: Kannurangu Lyrics Tamil Album Song By SathyaPrakash
stanzas:
Aayiram Vaarthaigal
thondruthe annaiye
thyaagame ondruthaan
varthaiye annaiye

sandhana maalaiyai
vaangithaan poduven.
naan oindha megame
nee pinbu ootinaai
neethaan en vazhkaiye
urakkam kolluvaai.

aariro araariro
en annaiye ne kannurangu.
boomiyai unathaakave
magan irukkiran
nee kannurangu. (2)

aari raariro
thaari aari
raari raariro

irunda un aaniver
irundhum naan vazhave
unai nee maatri
maari vazha thodanginai

karuvarai naalile
sumandha en dheivame
ingu neeyum naanum
vazhvu vazha vendinaai.

thiyagiyaagi maarinaai
naan oindha megame
nee pinbu ootinaai
neethaan en vazhkaiye
urakkam kolluvaai.

aariro araariro
en annaiye ne kannurangu.
boomiyai unathaakave
magan irukkiran
nee kannurangu. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannurangu?

The song Kannurangu is a devotional and soothing lullaby that evokes a sense of peace and reflection.

Who is the singer of Kannurangu?

The song is beautifully sung by Sathya Prakash.

Who composed the music for Kannurangu?

The music for Kannurangu was composed by Aashik Sridhar.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kannurangu?

The lyrics were penned by Siddharth.

When was Kannurangu released?

The song was released on August 18, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannurangu is a soothing and devotional lullaby that conveys a deep sense of peace and maternal love. Sung by Sathya Prakash, the lyrics by Siddharth beautifully express themes of sacrifice and tranquility. Aashik Sridhar's composition enhances the emotional depth, making it a perfect track for relaxation and reflection. The song's gentle melody and heartfelt words create a calming atmosphere, ideal for moments of introspection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soothing embrace of Kannurangu, a heartfelt melody by Sathya Prakash that captures the essence of devotion and tranquility. With Siddharth's poignant lyrics and Aashik Sridhar's soulful composition, this song is a serene lullaby that resonates with deep emotions. Let the calming notes of this track guide you to a place of peace and reflection.
stanzaMeanings: A thousand words come to mind, mother, sacrifice is the only word, mother.
I will buy and place a sandalwood garland. I am the fading cloud, you followed me, you are my life, you make me sleep.
Lullaby, lullaby, my mother, you sleep. The earth is yours, your son is here, you sleep.
Even in darkness, I lived because of you. You changed and began to live differently.
The god I carried in my womb, you and I wished for a life here.
You became a selfless person, I am the fading cloud, you followed me, you are my life, you make me sleep.
Lullaby, lullaby, my mother, you sleep. The earth is yours, your son is here, you sleep.
